'''âh-th-th-d''' ('''kahathedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaperone|chaperone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-th-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaperone|chaperone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-th-th-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahathedoko
|}
